news.paragraph: The DRAM sector is seeing strong momentum characterized by significant ETF inflows and rising interest in memory-focused funds linked to AI demand. Headlines suggest that memory chips are increasingly viewed as a critical bottleneck for AI, contributing to a broader semiconductor rally. Options traders should keep an eye on upcoming earnings from companies like Applied Materials, which are expected to highlight current market traction in the DRAM space.
